name: Bilingual Hindi / Gujarati Safety Signage
shortDescription: Exit, entry, assembly point and hazard signage in Gujarati and Hindi alongside English.
longDescription: For sites where the workforce reads Gujarati or Hindi more comfortably than English, we produce the full fire and safety signage range — exit, emergency exit, assembly point, fire alarm, entry — with the local-language text alongside or instead of the English wording, printed on the same photoluminescent or rigid material as the standard range. A small but real safety difference: a sign only works if the person reading it understands it immediately.

images.alt: Bilingual Hindi / Gujarati Safety Signage supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Covers
specs.value: Exit, emergency exit, assembly point, entry, fire alarm, hazard signage
